name: Mike Parsons
shortBio: Mike Parsons writes the Mana Influx series, a post-apocalyptic LitRPG progression saga following Bronwic as he navigates the mana-fueled reshaping of Earth. Under the pen name Kiwi Parsons, chapters premiere on Royal Road, with Kindle Unlimited editions delivering polished arcs for Amazon readers.
longBio:
Mike Parsons is the author of the Mana Influx series, an epic LitRPG progression fantasy that explores how humanity endures and evolves in the wake of a cataclysmic influx of mana. Writing as Kiwi Parsons on Royal Road, Mike releases chapters in serial form before polishing each book for Kindle, Kindle Unlimited, and additional formats. The saga tracks Bronwic’s ascent from survivor to lightning rod for humanity’s survival, balancing crunchy system mechanics, heartfelt character arcs, and high-stakes encounters.

Readers can follow along as Mike shares behind-the-scenes updates, early previews, and milestone announcements via the newsletter. Books 1–4 are available on Kindle and Kindle Unlimited, Books 1–3 are on Audible, and a Books 1–3 omnibus lets newcomers jump in quickly. A new Royal Road serial is in development, and the newsletter is the best way to hear about drop dates and exclusive bonuses.
